description: Clinical Trial Databases and key resources for MedTech, Biotech, AI-health, and related fields. Includes live sources for thousands of trials.

databases.focus: All clinical trials (drugs, devices, biologics, behavioral)
keyFeatures: Advanced search by condition, intervention, sponsor, phase, location
databases.notes: Largest public clinical trial registry. Essential for benchmarking and competitor analysis.

databases.focus: Clinical trials in the European Union and EEA
keyFeatures: Search by sponsor, condition, medicinal product
databases.notes: Mandatory for all EU clinical trials. Strong focus on transparency.

databases.databaseName: Australian New Zealand Clinical Trials Registry (ANZCTR)
databases.focus: Clinical trials in Australia and New Zealand
databases.notes: Primary registry for Australian MedTech and Biotech trials.

databases.databaseName: WHO International Clinical Trials Registry Platform (ICTRP)
databases.size: Aggregates data from 20+ registries (hundreds of thousands)
keyFeatures: Unified search across multiple national registries
databases.notes: Best source for international comparison and CEE/DACH trials.

keyFeatures: Search by drug name, sponsor, protocol number
Strong focus on transparency and results reporting
databases.notes: Widely used in UK and Europe.

integrationNotes: Your app can use the ClinicalTrials.gov API and WHO ICTRP for real-time search and filtering. For best performance, cache recent results and allow users to filter by phase, condition, sponsor, and location.
